notes: same N20 gearmotor form factor and gearbox as n20-motor-6v, wound for 12V instead — same rated power at roughly half the current, for a build running a higher-voltage pack.
description: A geared drive motor, same size and gearing as the 6V N20 but wound for a 12V supply — the choice when the rest of the build already runs a higher-voltage pack and a second regulated rail isn't wanted just for the drive motors.
